long_description: Enjoy layers of dark fruit and savoury spice built on a backbone of the dusty tannins for which Coonawarra is known. This shiraz expresses the bright flavours and structure of cooler-climate, French oak-matured shiraz, crafted in classic Penfolds style. Pair with braised beef or slow-roasted lamb.
name: Bin 128 Shiraz 2019 750ml

long_description: Yellowglen is Australia's premier house of sparkling wine and we are proud to have been a part of countless joyful moments of celebration and spontaneous rallying of friends for over forty years.
name: Nv Yellow Piccolo 200ml

description: CHARLES DE CAZANOVE TRADITION BRUT VINTAGE 750ML:EA
long_description: Great wines often take time, and that time is often spent in the chalk cellars of the Champagne region of France. The name, history and legend of Maison Charles de Cazanove - now one of the key houses in the world of Champagne - span more than 200 years, and the quality of its winemaking is evident in each and every drop.Charles de Cazanove utilises both stainless steel vats and oak barrels in the vinification process, the latter used to deliver fullness to the wine where necessary. Aged for nine years on lees, with the help of a dominant presence of chardonnay, this is a Champagne of unmatched greatness and rightly deserves a place in your sparkling collection.Adding to these credentials, it's no surprise that this wine was crafted by the renowned Christophe Rapeneau, winner of the International Wine Challenge's Sparkling Winemaker of the Year 2017.
name: Tradition Brut Vintage 750ml

long_description: In 1860, a barrel-maker called Victor Canard married a winemaker called Léonie Duchêne married. They both shared a great passion for wine and produced their own unique Champagne only 8 years after they met. The champagne house is located in Ludes, in the Montague de Reims National Park since 1868. These authentic, original Champagnes combine fruit, intensity and complexity. While the majority of leading Champagne houses are located in the urban setting of Reims or Epernay.Delicate, feminine and summery, Brut Rose has a decisively elegant style. Refined and elegant, the cuvée Brut Rosé is perfect addition to your evening aperitif or soirée. Intense aromas of fresh fruits, predominantly strawberry and raspberry. Slightly rosy hue, beautiful pearl finish, with fine bubbles. Notes of red fruit and subtle spicy aromas.
name: Brut Rose Nv 750ml

description: CANARD DUCHENE BRUT VINTAGE CHAMPAGNE GIFT BOX 750ML:EA
long_description: The champagne house is located in Ludes, in the Montague de Reims National Park since 1868. These authentic, original Champagnes combine fruit, intensity and complexity. While the majority of leading Champagne houses are located in the urban setting of Reims or Epernay, Canard-Duchêne is unusually situated in Ludes, on a hillside, at the very heart of the Montague de Reims vineyards. Located within the limits of the most prestigious terroirs, Ludes epitomises the magnificence of Pinot noir cultivated in Champagne.Toasted notes, revealing hints of white and citrus flowers upon aeration. Full-textured on the palate with a long finish.
name: Brut Vintage Champagne Gift Box 750ml

long_description: First produced in 1959, Bin 28 is Penfolds earliest Bin-range wine, a voluminous and glossy shiraz. With an interwoven tannic structure and alluring tobacco and dried fruit notes, this is a satisfying red wine for mature cheese and savoury dishes.
name: Bin 28 Shiraz 2019 750ml

long_description: A dry Cava (Spanish bubbles) with citrus notes and green apple flavours, this is one great wine at a bargain price and a favourite choice amongst our Liquorland customers.
name: Spanish Cava 750ml

long_description: • G.H. Mumm ensures that each bottle showcases the very best of the region, employing time-honoured traditional methods, the winemakers craft wines that exude the distinct Maison Mumm style-a perfect harmony of character and finesse
name: Grand Cordon Rose 750ml

description: CAMPO VIEJO NV CAVA BRUT RESERVA 750ML:EA
long_description: A fresh, well balanced sparkling wine made in the tradtional method. Very pleasant, fine and powerful aromas of fruit with hints of yeast. Round on the palate with sweep spots.
name: Nv Cava Brut Reserva 750ml

ingredients: Tempranillo, Graciano
long_description:
Bursting with vibrant red fruit smothered in dusty spice and perfect with all things chargrilled and wood-fired. This Iberian wonder wine could be your new favourite drop.

  • An approachable, joven style tempranillo - fresh, juicy and medium bodied

  • Sourced from two of Victoria's finest regions; Heathcote and the King Valley

  • Perfect with chargrilled meats and roasted vegetables
name: Tempranillo 750ml

long_description: The champagne house is located in Ludes, in the Montagne de Reims National Park since 1868. This authentic, original Champagne combines fruit intensity and complexity. While the majority of leading Champagne houses are located in the urban setting of Reims or Epernay, Canard-Duchêne is unusually situated in Ludes, on a hillside, at the very heart of the Montagne de Reims vineyards. Located within the limits of the most prestigious terroirs, Ludes epitomises the magnificence of Pinot noir cultivated in Champagne. From an assemblage of 60 different vineyard parcels. Nose: Intense aromas of fresh fruit, typical of Pinot varietals. Eye: A golden hue and delicate bubbles. Palate: Notes of fruit coupled with hints of buttery brioche. Now available in a half 375ml bottle.
name: Brut Nv Champagne 375ml

long_description: Keyneton Euphonium is a beautiful composition of shiraz from up to 50-year-old vines growing in the Eden and Barossa Valleys, blended with cabernet sauvignon, cabernet franc and merlot from selected vineyards in both regions.
name: Keyneton Euphonium 750ml

long_description:
Founded in 1743, Moët & Chandon is the Maison that introduced champagne to the world by offering a range of unique wines for every occasion. Moët Imperial Rose is spontaneous, radiant and enticing, a glamorous expression of the Moët & Chandon style. A style that distinguishes itself by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity. Rose Imperial is a radiant fruity champagne, the summit of what is extraverted and glamorous about Moët & Chandon's style.
  • Those who prefer champagnes with intense flavours will be particularly well matched to the lively and juicy Mot Rose Imperial.

  • An expressive palate combining intensity and suppleness.

  • The assemblage reflects the diversity and complementarity of the three grapes varietals: Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Meunier
name: Rose Brut Nv 750ml

long_description:
Jacob's Creek Trilogy Cuvee Brut is an elegant sparkling wine blended from the three classic varietals - Chardonnay, Pino Noir and Pinot Meunier. This wine is graceful with a delicate bead and a crisp, dry finish. Ideal for those more refined celebrations.
  • CONTAIN SULPHITES

  • Preservative (220) added
name: Trilogy Sparkling 750ml

description: CAVE DE LUGNY CREMANT BLANC DE BLANCS NV 750ML:EA
long_description: Cremant refers to French sparkling wine made in the traditional method outside of Champagne and is specific to a handful of regions. This one, from Burgundy, has a soft effervescence, is creamy and rich showing good complexity. A full, crisp style, exhibiting quality, cool climate Chardonnay fruit.'Made from 100 per cent chardonnay fruit grown just hours from Champagne. this is a glittering alternative to the real thing. It's clean, bright and tight with juicy pink grapefruit and orange blossom flavours and a lemon fresh finale. Offer incredible value for money.'- Sydney Morning Herald, 25 Jan 2013'A lacklustre label hides a gem here. This pale chardonnay sparkler from Burgundy has apple and stone-fruit aromas, a nutty thread, some patisserie notes and a fine, foaming mouth-feel ahead of a tangy finish. Score 91' - Age, Melbourne, 30 Oct 2012, by Ralph Kyte-Powell.
name: Cremant Blanc De Blancs Nv 750ml

long_description:
Rich, generous and approachable, the McGuigan Black Label range is your contemporary guide to Australia's most popular wine varieties. Whether it be a refreshing Sauvignon Blanc, a full-bodied Chardonnay or Australia's #1 selling bottled red wine, McGuigan Black Label Red, every bottle of McGuigan Black Label is packed full of varietal flavour, proving that you need not be a connoisseur to enjoy the wine of your choice for any occasion.
  • Rich and Generous

  • Approachable
name: Black Label Red Blend 750ml

long_description: Annie's Lane Shiraz is vibrant red with deep purple hues. Aromas of cassis lift from the glass while the palate is rich with plums, black olives and dried spices, balanced by subtle oak flavours with hints of chocolate. This wine is full to medium bodied
name: Shiraz 750ml

long_description:
We are so proud of the Brilla Prosecco Rose taking home Gold at the recent Frankfurt International Trophy 2022 Awards. Pick up a bottle today and judge for yourself.

Delicate and complex bouquet with fruity notes that remind of peach, green apple and lemon. Floral notes of acacia and rose. Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; Round and full-bodied structure. Enjoy rose bubbles as an aperitif but excellent with grilled fish and great friends.

Awards:
  • GOLD Rose Frankfurt International Trophy 2022 Awards Rose Category.
  • Bronze at the Decanter World Wine Awards 2022 Category - Sparking Wine. 88 Points
  • Bronze at the Winestate Italian 2023 . 91 Points
  • Silver at the Melbourne International Wine Competition Category - Sparkling Wines. 93 Points
  • Accolade at the Falstaff . 89 Points
name: Prosecco Spumante Doc Rose 750ml

long_description:
A refreshing, zesty and flavoursome wine with tropical fruit aromas, balanced herbal and citrus flavours. Perfectly paired with fresh seafood dishes and crunchy green salads. Delish!

Squeezed between the mighty ocean and towering mountain of New Zealand's South Island, Marlborough is often lashed by threating rain and wind (Atiru), which helps to build the character and resilience of the vines. Ocean breezes temper hot sunny days while the mountains provide cool nights creating wines of wonder.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

description: WOLF BLASS RED LABEL CHARDONNAY PINOT NOIR NV 750ML:EA
long_description: Wolf Blass Wines, established in 1966, has grown from a humble tin shed to become one of the world's most successful and awarded wineries. The essence of Wolf Blass wines is exemplified through the passion of its custodians, past and present as they continue to create wines of quality, character and consistency. Red Label chardonnay pinot noir premium cuvee is a rich, refreshing sparkling wine. Pale straw in colour, with aromas of citrus and strawberry, the palate is soft and creamy with a fine, crisp finish.
name: Red Label Chardonnay Pinot Noir Nv 750ml

long_description:
If there's not already a Chardonnay grape somewhere on Australia's coat of arms, it's about time we put one there. Chardonnay makes up a quarter of the total grape harvest in Australia, and the incredible diversity of vineyards - including our very own Yarra Valley, Strathbogie Ranges and Whitlands Plateau - is a gift for sparkling wine lovers. Alongside its bright, softly acidic flavours of Fuji apples, pears, nectarines and Meyer lemons, comes an aroma of fresh lime blossom and fennel. This release of Chandon Blanc de Blancs was the perfect opportunity to show off a truly Australian style of Chardonnay using the traditional method, and it's one that's going straight to the pool room.
  • Chandon Blanc de blancs is a celebration of Australian Chardonnay. Vibrant and bold fruit flavours, both citrus and stone fruits abundantly on display.
name: Blanc De Blancs Nv 750ml

description: GRANT BURGE LITTLE KINGS GRENACHE SHIRAZ MOURVEDRE 750ML:EA
long_description: This Barossa Valley red blend of grenache, shiraz and mourvedre showcases notes of black cherry, raspberry, honey nougat, liquorice followed by a hint of orange peel on the nose. A truly delightful GSM for a wintery night in.
name: Little Kings Grenache Shiraz Mourvedre 750ml

description: YERING STATION LITTLE YERING PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: Little Yering is the second label from famed Yarra producer Yering Station. Lifted strawberry and red cherry fruit with gamey notes complemented with subtle vanillin oak. Good structure and persistence with great depth of fruit and a savoury finish.
name: Little Yering Pinot Noir 750ml

description: VEUVE CLICQUOT YELLOW LABEL BRUT NV 750ML:EA
long_description:
Founded in 1772, Veuve Clicquot has since lived by it's motto, Only one quality, the finest. Yellow Label is it's signature champagne, defining the Veuve Clicquot style through a perfect balance of strength, aromatic intensity, freshness and silkiness. The predominance of Pinot Noir provides the structure while the addition of 30 to 45% of priceless Reserve Wines will ensure the year on year consistency that is so typically Clicquot. 
On the nose: yellow and white fruits, then notes of vanilla and later of brioche. On the palate: freshness and strength while pear and lemon tastes appear.

90 Points -Wine Spectator
94 Points -Bettane + Desseauve
94 Points -Decanter
  • The signature of Veuve Clicquot's quality and style

  • The performance of Pinot Noir provides the structure that is so typically Veuve Clicquot, while a touch of Meunier rounds out the blend. Chardonnay adds the elegance and finesse essential in a perfectly balanced wine.

  • Veuve Clicquot Yellow Label is the house's signature champagne - balancing all 4 dimensions defining the Veuve Clicquot style: freshness, strength, aromatic richness & silkiness.

  • To ensure the quality and continuity of the Yellow Label's style, the blend can be created with up to 45% reserve wines. Veuve Clicquot has the largest and the most varied collection of reserve wines (400 wines, aged up to 30 years)
name: Yellow Label Brut Nv 750ml

long_description: A rich, full-flavoured wine from premium vineyards throughout South Australia. It packs a fruity punch with cherry, plum and dark forest fruit flavours. A customer favourite, this deep ruby-red shiraz is the ideal accompaniment to roasted or grilled meats such as beef or venison, as well as hard cheeses such as cheddar and parmesan. One of our favourite wines here at Liquorland.
name: Shiraz 750ml

long_description: A true aperitif style sparkling wine that blends the rich strawberry lift and fine mousse of Pinot Noir with the nectarine, cashew and biscuity Chardonnay characters.
name: Nv 750ml

long_description:
Generous and balanced with rich ripe raspberry and blueberry aromas that shows excellent regional and varietal integrity.
  • At the helm of the St Hugo winemaking team is the talented Peter Munro, who took the reins as Chief Winemaker in 2019. With over two decades of experience in prestigious wine regions like the Barossa Valley, Hawke's Bay, and Napa Valley, Peter brings a wealth of knowledge and passion to his craft.

  • The St Hugo Signature Collection has also earned its fair share of accolades, with outstanding ratings and points from respected critics such as Tyson Stelzer, Huon Hooke, and James Suckling. From the iconic Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon to the elegant Eden Valley Riesling, each wine in the St Hugo range embodies the dedication that defines the St Hugo name.
name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

long_description: Traditional winemaking techniques and an eye to modern styles allow us to create wines that are synonymous with the regions they are from. Rich, honest wines that showcase the regions in their most natural light. Pepperjack Barossa Cabernet Sauvignon is a blend of Cabernet Sauvignon parcels, sourced from premium vineyards throughout the Barossa. A rich, plush and concentrated wine with distinct varietal leafy notes and fine, textural tannins.
name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

long_description: To craft this Double Barrel Shiraz, we started with premium, ripe grapes from selected vineyards. First matured in traditional oak barrels, select parcels are finished in aged whisky barrels to add rich, savoury notes.
name: Double Barrel Shiraz 750ml

long_description: A gentle and clean style, the Rock Paper Scissors Sparkling Brut is as pleasant a bubbles you'll find for the price. Delicate and floral on the nose with light peach and apricot fruit on the pallet, rounded out but a dash of refreshing acidity.
name: Sparkling 750ml

long_description:
[yellow tail] Sparkling Cuvee Rose has been crafted as a celebration of our Italian heritage. It's vibrant, floral and easy to drink.
  • The Casella family has been crafting wines for generations; the samefamily traditions and passion carry on today through [yellow tail].

  • Great tasting Australian wine that brings a smile to everyone's lips!
name: Sparkling Cuvee Rose 750ml

long_description: Grapes from New Zealand bring stunning intensity and flavour to our Pinot Gris. The palate is full and juicy, with ripe apple and citrus coming through up front, leading into a long, luscious stone fruit finish. A refreshingly smooth and balanced drop. Squealing Pig is a tale about a pig who wanted more from life than just his pig pen. Keen on wine, but not a fan of the boar that you get with it, he began his adventure in New Zealand before spreading his wings over the ditch to Australia and other parts of the world.
name: Pinot Gris 750ml

long_description:
Cloudy Bay Sauvignon Blanc put New Zealand on the map with its captivating flavour. This, vintage of our Sauvignon Blanc is mouth-wateringly intense, revealing notes of makrut lime, hibiscus and pink grapefruit.

Cloudy Bay Sauvignon Blanc is a natural match for almost any seafood. Some favourites include tempura oysters, sashimi, and steamed mussels with garlic, citrus and parsley. It's also a great match for green salads and goats' cheese. A hint from us: if it goes with lemon, it goes with Sauvignon Blanc.

94 Points -Decanter
93 Points -Wine Spectator
92 Points -James Suckling
  • his, the 40th Vintage of our Sauvignon Blanc is mouthwateringly intense, revealing notes of makrut lime, hibiscus and pink grapefruit.

  • Cloudy Bay Sauvignon Blanc put New Zealand on the map with its captivating flavour.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: An approachable easy to drink style and long-time favourite that has ripe plum fruit on a soft well rounded palate. While it displays generous red fruit flavours & spice, it is a lighter style red which serves well slightly chilled. It's simply perfect for the Summer Australian Christmas.
name: Sparkling Shiraz 750ml

long_description:
Jansz Tasmania is a luxury sparkling wine house, solely devoted to the art of sparkling winemaking since 1986. Location is integral to growing outstanding fruit and only Tasmania can boast such idyllic conditions. Put simply, it is the perfect place to craft premium sparkling wines. By allowing nature to do the work, our wines are naturally expressive of our Tasmanian home and its pure, pristine environment. Undeniably Tasmanian. Unmistakably Jansz.

Coupling Old World inspiration with New World innovation, Jansz Tasmania crafts this wine from vineyards throughout Tasmania, all of which produce high quality Chardonnay and Pinot Noir. Component wines are kept separate during winemaking to maximise blending options and the complexity of the final wine.
  • Cool climate Tasmanian sparkling Pinot Noir dominant wine.

  • Bottle fermented.

  • 18 months average aging on tirage.

  • Minimum 3 months bottle age prior to release.
name: Non Vintage Sparkling 750ml

description: BIRD IN HAND SPARKLING PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
Our Sparkling is here to remind you of the endless pleasure of optimism.

Predominantly from Pinot Noir, grapes from premium cool sites across South Australia were harvested during the cool of night to retain freshness and flavour for this wine.

Crushed and destemmed straight to press with minimal time on skins ensured the extraction of only the lightest of colour. Individual batches from each vineyard were kept separate right up until blending, to guarantee the winemakers could select the best fruit based on flavour, complexity and cohesiveness.

The result is a light, delicate sparkling, pearl pink in colour, with floral notes and hints of fresh strawberry and citrus blossom on the nose. Its lively palate evokes flavours of fleshy red berry fruits with a delicate bead, leading to a refreshing, clean finish.

The perfect pre-dinner aperitif or celebratory drink.
Enjoy chilled and whilst young.
name: Sparkling Pinot Noir 750ml

description: GRANT BURGE PINOT NOIR CHARDONNAY NV 750ML:EA
long_description: Tinged with copper hues, the wine deals out a delightful biscuit-like nose combined with ripe strawberry and peach characters. The palate is rich and generous with a real vitality that's heightened by the creamy mouth-feel. This is a sparkling that adapts to its environment, and as such is just as enjoyable with food as it is on its own.
name: Pinot Noir Chardonnay Nv 750ml

long_description: Boasting a delicate nose displaying apple and pear characters. While this wine retains the freshness and vibrancy that Prosecco is known for, just think sunshine & bubbles in a glass.
name: Prosecco 750ml

description: CHARLES DE CAZANOVE BRUT TRADITION NV 750ML:EA
long_description: The Charles de Cazanove brand is one of the oldest in the Champagne region. It was started in 1811, by Charles Gabriel De Cazanove - an unusual deviation for a man from a long line of master glassmakers. From early on in their history, Charles de Cazanove were supplying European politicians and diplomats, as well as many French presidents. In 1983, leading winemaker, Christophe Rapeneau, joined Charles De Cazanove. He modernised the winery to guarantee the authenticity of the wines being crafted. Partnering with local grape growers and partners all over the Champagne region, Charles De Cazanove craft and produce champagnes made from rich, varied assemblages - which satisfy and tantalise a wide variety of tastes all over the world.Surprisingly complex champagne, the nose displays aromas of pink grapefruit, brioche and vanilla with a touch of lemon acidity. - Best Sparkling Winemaker - International Wine Challenge 2017.- Gold - NZ International Wine Show 2015.
name: Brut Tradition Nv 750ml

long_description: This fabulously affordable French bubbles comes not from Champagne, but from the Vouvray region of France's Loire Valley. It has both ripe apple fruit and toasty flavours that make it ideal as an aperitif or to accompany seafood.
name: Brut Nv 750ml

long_description:
A Chardonnay from one of our favourite New Zealand wineries. Sensational fruit quality and a subtle use of oak, with no malo-lactic fermentation, make this a stunning, honest wine, with great intensity and structure. Gotta love that!

Oyster Bay is located in the South Pacific Ocean on the tip of the Marlborough Sounds, where the climate is ideal for producing their hallmark wines. The grapes ripen in the warm summer days while the chilly nights help to capture the flavour. This pattern creates one of the longest grape growing seasons on earth and produces the unmistakable, zesty flavours and fragrances of Oyster Bay wines.
name: Chardonnay 750ml

long_description:
Ready to serve, just add ice and orange. Garden Spritz is the blend of an exceptional sparkling wine and a unique bitters recipe crafted with navel and blood oranges macerated with dry or dried orange peels, herbs and spices carefully selected from the finest terroirs in the world. We bring nature to the world of spritz. No artificial flavours and no artificial colorants are used at any stage in its production. Our orange bitters are crafted using natural ingredients, making Garden Spritz simply and naturally delicious.
  • Perfect for picnics, afternoon drinks, aperitif moments and brunch. Pour Chandon Garden Spritz into a large glass. Add 3-4 ice cubes and a citrus garnish.

  • Fresh ingredients including navel and blood oranges. All natural ingredients, no artificial colorants, no artificial aromas. Superior Chandon Wine.

  • Ready to serve, just add ice and orange
name: Garden Spritz 750ml

long_description: Penfolds Max's Shiraz Cabernet is a tribute toformer Chief Winemaker Max Schubert 1948-1975, a legend in Penfolds history. Max's constantpursuit of excellence paved the way for those whofollowed in his footsteps and also allowed thestatus and heritage of Penfolds to grow. A moreapproachable Penfolds style at release - ideallyshelf to glass, save the cellar.
name: Max's Shiraz 750ml

long_description:
A delicately pale pink colour with aromas of raspberry, strawberry and a hint of white petals. The lightly rounded palate is balanced perfectly with good intensity, vibrant acidity and a subtle herbal edge. The long finish leaves a lingering character of red berries and cream. The grapes used for the Winton Road Rose are carefully harvested from vineyards around Barossa. The time on skins is limited to create a delicate blush colour with the vinification taking place in stainless steel to retain freshness and increase aromatics. A short period on lees is used to build texture and increase complexity in the final wine.

Awards:
  • Gold Royal Queensland Awards 2023.
name: Barossa Valley Rose 750ml

long_description: Blush in colour with vibrant notes of berry and citrus, a refreshing sparkling wine to be enjoyed now while it's light and delicate. A delicate nose displaying strawberry, watermelon and apple flavours. While this wine retains the freshness and vibrancy that Prosecco is known for, this rosé also provides a subtle hint of berry on the palate. This refreshing sparkling is made to drink young while at its light and delicate best. Prosecco Rosé is a great drink to kick off an evening and enjoy throughout the night. While delicious on its own, it is also perfect with Tasmanian smoked salmon with a squeeze of lemon juice. Or try it with tempura squid and a sweet chilli dipping sauce.
name: Prosecco Rose 750ml

long_description: This medium to full bodied Merlot is filled with liqueur cherry, vanilla and dark chocolate flavours. Textured soft palate with gentle tannins complimented with a lingering sweet fruit finish. With five generations of winemaking in each bottle, it's something your sure to love.
name: 5th Generation Merlot 750ml

long_description:
Bold, edgy and elegant - The Graphite series redefines the meaning of every day drinking with its approachable fruit flavours and smooth finish. Sourced from premium wine regions throughout Australia. The fruit was crushed, de-stemmed and immediately clarified. Fermentation followed for 2 weeks at cool temperatures after inoculating with selected yeast strains. This allowed the wine to retain intense aromas and maximum fruit characters. Post fermentation the wine was blended and bottled to maintain ultimate freshness.
  • Bold, Edgy and Elegant

  • Smooth
name: Graphite Prosecco 750ml

long_description: Bright and effervescent with a full bead and creamy mousse. Aromas of citrus and candied peel with hints of tropical fruits and orange blossom, combined with persistent bubbles and a stylish crisp finish.
name: Sparkling White 750ml

long_description: An explosion of bright refreshing citrus with a hint of pink grapefruit and tantalising bubbles. Enjoy with sushi rolls or a warm chicken salad.
name: Bulloak Cuvee Blanc 750ml

long_description: This New Zealand Pinot Gris offers creamy pear notes, honey and hints of caramel with citrus and vanilla. The palate reflects the nose with flavours of ripe pear and honey. There is a creamy weight when drinking and follows with rich flavours of tangerine. Ideally suited to drink with poached or steamed delicate fish such as tuna or trout, accompanied by green vegetables like green beans and kale. A great all-rounder for any occasion.
name: Pinot Gris 750ml

description: RED HILL ESTATE COOL CLIMATE CHARDONNAY 750ML:EA
long_description: Red Hill 'Cool Climate' Chardonnay shows a great concentration of white peach, nectarine and white flower blossom on the nose. There are tropical fruits such as pineapple, honeydew and ripe peach that seamlessly integrate with a firm structured acidity on the palate. This wine has a great clean finish and is ideal to drink now.
name: Cool Climate Chardonnay 750ml

long_description: Punters Corner Cabernet shows classic Coonawarra characters with rich blackcurrant fruit and an undercurrent of mint and delicious cedar oak notes. Dark and dense there's classic regional mint and leaf nuances together with quality oak lending support. It's the ideal accompaniment to roasted or grilled meats such as beef or venison, as well as hard cheeses such as cheddar and parmesan.
name: Cabernet Sauvignon 750ml

long_description:
The Taste Collection is a celebration of the generous and distinct flavours that have made Selaks wines so extraordinary and sought after for over 90 years. We've called this Chardonnay Buttery because it is smooth and creamy and melts in your mouth. The delicate oak adds notes of vanilla while still enabling the delightful ripe stone fruit characters to shine through. Selaks, bringing family and friends together since 1934.
  • Buttery Flavour
name: Taste Collection Buttery Chardonnay 750ml

long_description:
Colour Description

It has a straw colour with subtle green hues.

Aroma Description

A delicate nose displaying apple and pear characters.

Palate Description

Delicate golden hue. 

Peak Drinking Description

Ready to drink now.

Food Pairing Description

This refreshing sparkling wine begs to be enjoyed while young and fresh, and is the perfect companion to sushi, sashimi, or light salty snacks.

Growing Conditions

The grapes for this wine were grown in the cool climate King Valley.
name: Prosecco Nv 750ml

long_description: This delicious Pinot Noir has characters of dark cherries and spice. It's juicy, smooth and velvety on the palate with soft, fine tannins. Great paired with people.
name: Pinot Noir 750ml

description: CANARD DUCHENE BRUT NV CHAMPAGNE GIFT BOX 750ML:EA
long_description: The champagne house is located in Ludes, in the Montague de Reims National Park since 1868. These authentic, original Champagnes combine fruit, intensity and complexity. While the majority of leading Champagne houses are located in the urban setting of Reims or Epernay, Canard-Duchêne is unusually situated in Ludes, on a hillside, at the very heart of the Montague de Reims vineyards. Located within the limits of the most prestigious terroirs, Ludes epitomises the magnificence of Pinot noir cultivated in Champagne.From an assemblage of 60 different vineyard parcels. Nose: Intense aromas of fresh fruit, typical of Pinot varietals. Eye: A golden hue and delicate bubbles. Palate: Notes of fruit coupled with hints of buttery brioche.
name: Brut Nv Champagne Gift Box 750ml

long_description: We are thrilled to present this latest edition of summer thirst quenching rosés to the range. Located in the picturesque Anjou district of France's western Loire Valley, the region is famous for producing generously flavoured, textural wines with various levels of sweetness. The two red grapes used in production, Grolleau and Cabernet Franc impart a delicious spectrum of summer red berry fruit, combining the classic stylistic descriptor of strawberries and cream.
name: Rose D'anjou 750ml

long_description: Red Hill is one of the most consistent Pinot producers. This release shows the familiar perfume and elegance with flavours of liqueur cherries, spice and silky tannins. Well worth including in your next purchase.Red Hill Cool Climate Pinot Noir. On the palate this soft yet structured Pinot Noir displays distinctive varietal characters of game, forest floor and dark cherry.
name: Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: Just-black to bright-purple with an invitingly thin and opaque rim edge. White chocolate bullets of piercing aromaticity; some faint and fine rum and raisin oak bouquet falls in behind; the powdery milk and white chocolate so typical of this wine rings - or rather wafts - out, brightly and pertly.. A mouthful and a medley of plush rounded fruits, textural tannins, and task-mastering acidity - each element an extrovert by nature, but each element subdued to ‘the useful and the good', as the poet said. The wine finishes in a dry manner, with promise and savour and succulence.
name: Shiraz 750ml

description: GRANT BURGE PINOT NOIR CHARDONNAY ROSE NV 750ML:EA
long_description: Our bottle fermented Pinot Noir Chardonnay Rose is made from fruit grown in the elevated cool climate regions of the Adelaide Hills, Alpine Valley, and Eden Valley. The grapes from these regions produce wines with delicate aroma and flavour profiles coupled with high natural acidity and elegant structure, characters that are paramount for the production of high quality sparkling wine. Brimming with fresh red berry flavours, dry and rich in style, this is best enjoyed with great company.
name: Pinot Noir Chardonnay Rose Nv 750ml

long_description:
The delicious flavours of freshly cut strawberries and cream, balanced by zingy acidity and gorgeous length. Enjoy as an aperitif, with tapas or salmon salad.

The Bulloak range draws its name from the majestic stand of Bulloak (Buloke) trees located at our Zilzie property, providing a scenic backdrop to our vineyards and winery. With a commitment to preserving the land, the Forbes family generously returned this area to the Department of Sustainability & Environment. This act safeguards not only the Bulloak trees but also the region's rich natural diversity, ensuring a legacy for generations to come.
name: Bulloak Rose 750ml

long_description:
Chandon Rose is our little ode to the fruit that calls Australia home, and it sings thanks to the careful blending of wines from the Strathbogie Ranges, Whitlands Plateau and Yarra Valley. Up here, the cool climate helps our Pinot Noir vines thrive, and that elegant, rose-petal pink hue is our secret little love letter to one of Australia's favourite red grapes. This bottle is layered with the refreshing flavours of redcurrant, cherry sorbet and pink grapefruit zest alongside delightfully dry notes of hazelnut and biscuit. To bring out their natural, vibrant flavours the vines enjoy breathing the cool, mountain air of Victoria's high country. After all, that's what gives Chandon Rose its refreshingly unique personality.

Best Australian Sparkling Wine 2024 - Champagne and Sparkling Wine World Championship
The Champange & Sparkling Wine
World Championship 2024 -Gold
  • Pinot noir, front and centre in this wine, is widely recognised as a grape variety which has the most alluring aromas. Beautifully crafted Australian Sparkling Wine

  • CHANDON Rose is perfect for an aperitif with friends, summer lunches and barbecues

  • Best Australian Sparkling wine at the 2024 Champagne & Sparkling Wine World Championship
name: Nv Rose 750ml

long_description:
A classic Australian blend, with balanced fruit flavours from the Sauvignon Blanc and refreshing, gentle acidity from the Semillon.
  • CONTAIN SULPHITES

  • Preservative (220) added
name: Semillon Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Squealing Pig Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc is brimming with tropical fruit flavours of pineapple, passionfruit and citrus.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: A bright and lively sparkling wine with white peach, pistachio, apple and honeydew. A balanced palate with a hint of sweetness and textural finish.
name: Yb Prosecco 750ml

long_description:
Ovation Brut Cuvee bares a pale-gold colour with aromas of French pastries, fresh strawberries, and preserved lemon. The palate is elegantly balanced displaying red current, nougat, and lemon curd. The delicate bead and gentle creamy texture are offset by a refreshing acidity and complex finish with lingering flavours of lemon meringue.

Ovation Brut Cuvee is crafted from Pinot Noir, Chardonnay and Meunier grapes sourced from some of the Adelaide Hills best sparkling wine vineyards. The wine is made in the traditional method with a blend of vintages to build complexity with the wine spending an average of 35 months on yeast lees.
name: Brut Cuvee 750ml

long_description: Faith Shiraz is a vibrant and expressive example of Barossa Shiraz. An accessible, juicy and fruit driven wine, Faith's vibrant yet dense purple hue hints at the generosity of fruit within. The bouquet is lifted with bright cherry fruit characters and a hint of chocolate with enticing spice notes.This is followed by dark berry fruits that combine with a lively palate entwined with pepper spices and chocolate tones. A long savoury finish is coated in soft tannins to complete this rich and generous palate.
name: Faith Shiraz 750ml

description: ST HUBERTS THE STAG PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description: St Huberts The Stag Yarra Valley Pinot Noir is sophisticated, yet refined has a cool climate in style; red currants, cranberries, muddled strawberries and spice support supple tannins and an elegant finish. The wine is light to medium bodied, and savoury, spicy cherry flavours follow from the nose.
name: The Stag Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: Yellowglen is Australia's premier house of sparkling wine and we are proud to have been a part of countless joyful moments of celebration and spontaneous rallying of friends for over forty years.
name: Nv Yellow 750ml

long_description:
The Jacob's Creek Reserve Sparkling Prosecco is a delicate fruit driven wine showcasing flavours of pear blossom and citrus with slightly floral notes and a hint of sweetness. The wine's crisp and refreshing flavour is in perfect balance with its fine, elegant bubbles and creamy finish.

A delicious wine, it is best served chilled, either as an aperitif, or with a range of seafood dished.
  • CONTAINS SULPHITES
name: Reserve Sparkling Prosecco 750ml

description: WOLF BLASS RED LABEL CABERNET MERLOT 750ML:EA
long_description: Wolf Blass Wines, established in 1966, has grown from a humble tin shed to become one of the world's most successful and awarded wineries. The Cabernet Sauvignon provides length and a subtle yet persistent structure, while merlot lends a plush, plummy mid-palate to this classic red blend. A generous wine with bright, dark fruit flavours, a juicy palate and soft, approachable tannins of Wolf Blass wines is exemplified through the passion of its custodians, past and present as they continue to create wines of quality, character and consistency.
name: Red Label Cabernet Merlot 750ml

long_description: This Shiraz is loaded with vibrant fruit, with a mid palate structure that's rich and ripe. Soft and smooth the whole way through, beautifully delivered.
name: Shiraz 750ml

long_description: Make a statement with this GOLD bottle from Sensi. Prosecco is one of the most approachable bubblies you can get your hands on. We have been on the lookout for the perfect Prosecco for a while - and here it is. The Sensi is loaded with generous apples, pears and stonefruit, with a refreshing and dry finish. The perfect gift.
name: Prosecco Doc 18k Gold 750ml

description: MOET & CHANDON BRUT IMPERIAL NV CHAMPAGNE 750ML:EA
long_description:
Founded in 1743, Moet & Chandon is the Maison that introduced Champagne to the world by offering a range of unique wines for every occasion. Moët & Chandon Imperial is a complete, generous and dynamic Champagne made of Chardonnay, Pinot Noir and Meunier. Moët Imperial is the House's iconic Champagne. Created in 1869, it embodies Moët & Chandon's unique style - a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.
  • Created from more than 100 different wines, of which 20% to 30% are reserve wines.

  • Representing the diversity of the Champagne region through the assemblage of the 3 main grape varieties of the region, the style of Mot Imperial is versatile and can be enjoyed from the aperitif to the end of the night. Distributed in more than 150 countries, it is the world most loved champagne.
name: Brut Imperial Nv Champagne 750ml

long_description: This classic Australian blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Shiraz is a elegant sip to share with friends over dinner. These iconic varieties are stars of the Limestone Coast region, resulting in a structured, complex, and layered wine that's ready to drink now or will age in the cellar for several years. Enjoyed for dark berry concentration and elegant cigar box spice from thoughtful oak treatment, this is a generous wine for red wine lovers.
name: Limestone Coast Cabernet Shiraz 750ml

long_description:
Moscato is an often-misunderstood grape, yet in the hands of a talented winemaker it's pretty memorable: an approachable and easy-drinking white wine that's beautifully fresh with a soft musk aroma, and a delicate sparkling finish. Best enjoyed chilled. 

Brown Brothers Moscato is beautifully clean with a light straw colour and some youthful green tinges. The nose is lifted with aromas of musk, citrus and freshly crushed grapes. In the mouth the wine is alive with a vibrant and mouth-filling sherbet flavour.

Try this versatile wine with a platter of soft cheese and green apple, or loaded Vietnamese rice paper rolls. The aromatic lift of Moscato complements many spicy dishes while the sweetness balances the chilli heat.
name: Moscato 750ml

description: WIRRA WIRRA CHURCH BLOCK RED BLEND 750ML:EA
ingredients: CABERNET SAUVIGNON(50%),~SHIRAZ(41%),~MERLOT(9%)
long_description:
Deep crimson. Classic blackberry, leaf and briar of Cabernet Sauvignon are closely pursued by opulent plums and wild herbs of Shiraz and Merlot. Five spice, dark chocolate and ripe mixed berries underpin the varietal cascade. Hallmarks of a timeless Church Block. A wealth of cassis, plums and black cherries are tethered to the palate with smartly ripened tannin. Dense, plush and balanced with a lovely core of ripe fruit, this wine is effortless in its harmony and energy. 
  • Classic blackberry, leaf and briar of Cabernet Sauvignon are closely pursued by opulent plums and wild herbs of Shiraz and Merlot.
name: Church Block Red Blend 750ml

description: BOLLINGER SPECIAL CUVEE BRUT NV CHAMPAGNE 750ML:EA
long_description: Bollinger is one of the best French Champagnes around, hands down. Known and loved for its full-bodied character. A bottle of Bollie is the perfect thing to bring along to a party or special celebration.
name: Special Cuvee Brut Nv Champagne 750ml

long_description: Lemon and grapefruit juice aromas with a lick of mineral and wet slate on the nose. A wine of great length and drive with lashings of fresh grapefruit and citrus rind flavours and an orange blossom lift. The clean and zesty acid line gives length to the generous offerings of flavour.
name: Barry & Sons' Riesling 750ml

long_description: Refreshing citrus and tropical fruit, a classic staple when you're looking for a crisp and dry white wine. In convenient packaging, this 5 litre cask will save you throwing away oxidised wine, and also a few trips back and forth to the shop. A great value drop.
name: Crisp Dry White 5l

long_description: Oyster Bay Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc takes on the magical flavours of passion fruit, bright citrus and gooseberry, with a zesty finish. A concentration of assertive passionfruit and tropical fruit flavours with an abundant bouquet, it is a wine that is always crisp, elegant and refreshing. The quintessential Sauvignon Blanc, with all the flavours and aromas that Marlborough delivers.
name: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

long_description: Sourced from select vineyards amidst the foothills of the Massif Central in France, this Pinot Noir is a brilliant expression of the land from which it is made. It has fruit forward flavours of strawberry and raspberry with a long, smooth finish.
name: Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: Pale and bright lemon colour with aromas of white peach, nashi pear, nougat and citrus. The palate is nicely weighted and shows the delicate sweet spice of oak with a hint of creme fraiche to accompany the orchard, stone fruit and citrus characters. The complex finish is accompanied by a gentle and refreshing acidity and a flint-like minerality. The grapes used for the Winton Road Chardonnay are carefully harvested from selected vineyards of the Eden Valley and vinified using traditional methods. The wine is matured in a combination of new and aged French barriques with time on lees to develop complexity and structure.
name: Eden Valley Chardonnay 750ml

description: JACOB'S CREEK RESERVE CHARDONNAY PINOT NOIR 750ML:EA
long_description:
The Jacob's Creek Reserve Sparkling Chardonnay Pinot Noir is a premium quality sparkling wine. Sourced predominantly from South Australia, it showcases classic cool climate character, it has delicate lemon citrus flavours of Chardonnay balanced with the redcurrant berry character and classic structure typical of Pinot Noir. Its creamy complexity is in perfect harmony with its vibrant fruit flavours.
A delicious wine which can also be enjoyed with a wide range of seafood, salad and white meat.
  • CONTAIN SULPHITES

  • Preservative (220) added
name: Reserve Chardonnay Pinot Noir 750ml

long_description: A contemporary red blend that delivers juicy layers of red fruit and notes of cedar. The finish is delivered with a subtle oak texture and rounded tannins. Pair with savoury and slow-roasted meals.
name: Bin 8 Shiraz Cabernet 750ml

long_description: No list of great Champagne houses would be complete without Piper-Heidsieck. It consistently over-delivers on quality, thanks to the precision of Chef de Cave, Regis Camus, winner of no less than 8 International Wine Challenge Sparkling Winemaker of the Year honours. The medium bodied house style captures all the great hallmarks of purity and finesse associated with great Champagne. Gentle toasty notes support a framework of fresh flowers, juicy apple and citrus, that finishes squeaky clean.'I am very proud of this outstanding recognition which strongly reaffirms the excellence of our wines. The oenological committee and I work every day to perpetuate the quality and the style of the Piper- Heidsieck champagnes. It is an amazing reward and a major achievement for the Piper-Heidsieck.' - Emilien Boutillat, Piper-Heidsieck Chef de Caves. TOP 100   Wine Spectator's 2019 Top 100 list.
name: Brut Nv Champagne 750ml

long_description: A touch of pinky bronze entices to start, followed by a delicate nose of lemon blossom and pear. The palate is streamlined and minerally boasting an array of citrus fruit and a little chalkiness on the finish.
name: Estate Pinot Grigio 750ml

long_description: A vibrant and refreshing sparkling wine with lively citrus fruit notes best enjoyed chilled with food and friends, anytime.
name: Yb Cuvee Nv 750ml

long_description: Yellowglen is Australia's premier house of sparkling wine and we are proud to have been a part of countless joyful moments of celebration and spontaneous rallying of friends for over forty years. Pink Rose blushes with elegant refreshing flavours full of luscious berries.  Best enjoyed with the girls and a punnet of fresh strawberries.
name: Nv Pink 750ml

long_description: At release, this Shiraz is a dark red colour with ruby red hues. On the nose the wine dispays dark plum, redcurrant and red cherry fruits along with subtle chocolate and a touch of oak derived spice. The palate is plump & generous with ripe fruit characters of plum, cherry and redcurrant. Mocha coffee and subtle aniseed characters are also present along with vanillan oak to balance the fruit flavours. The wine is medium-bodied with a soft mid-palate & pleasing tannin structure. It is a well balanced wine with great texture, good length and enjoyable fruit flavours on the finish. The wine was matured in American oak for 12 months followed by fining, minimal filtration & bottling. Crafted for immediate enjoyment but will cellar over a medium term under ideal conditions.
name: Estate Shiraz 750ml

long_description: Shaw + Smith has become known as a benchmark for Adelaide Hills, and Australian, Sauvignon Blanc. The style has remained fresh, aromatic, and pure over the journey. Recent evolution has been to source from higher and cooler sites, allowing the wine to retain lively acidity if conditions are warmer. Typically it shows a pink grapefruit character, concentration and mid-palate texture, which reflect the carefully selected sites and hand harvesting during the small window of perfect ripeness. The vintage is true to style with accentuated florals and very bright natural acidity.
name: Sauvignon Blanc 750ml

description: DE BORTOLI PREMIUM SEM SAUV BLANC CASK 4L:EA
long_description: De Bortoli Premium Semillon Sauvignon Blanc is a blend of two varieties that brings together the citrus of Semillon with green gooseberry characters of Sauvignon Blanc. It is a light fresh wine that finishes crisp and clean. Enjoy with seafood, salads or Asian food.
name: Premium Sem Sauv Blanc Cask 4l

long_description: It was only a matter of time before Oyster Bay, known for its well priced Sauvignon Blanc, took advantage of the New Zealand cool, temperate, maritime influenced climate to make a refreshing sparkler. Here it is, a 100% Chardonnay Cuvee with elegance, finesse and lively bubbles. The fruit is harvested early to accentuate the Chardonnay varietal character and display hints of peach and minerals, with and a crisp finish. This sparkling more than exceeded our expectations and offers brilliant value for money.
name: Sparkling Cuvee Brut 750ml

long_description:
If variety is the spice of life, then Chandon Brut is a perfectly seasoned little sparkling. A mix of Chardonnay, Pinot Noir and Meunier grapes are all carefully selected from cool climate locations across Victoria's high country. It's the changes in altitude, age and aspect that can create something deliciously unexpected. The result is a fresh, vibrant finish with hints of apple sorbet, lemon zest, sourdough and nougat. It's diversity that makes the difference - and luckily for us, we've got it in spades.

SILVER - 2024 CHAMPAGNE & SPARKLING WORLD WINE AWARDS
93 PTS - 2023 HALLIDAY WINE COMPANION
  • Chandon Brut is at the cornerstone of Chandon Australia winemaking, combining pristine Australian vineyard resources with French heritage and savior fair.

  • Local Australian sparkling
name: Nv Sparkling Brut 750ml

description: JACOB'S CREEK CHARDONNAY PINOT NOIR NV 750ML:EA
long_description: Crisp, clean bubbly with some Granny Smith apple crunchiness. Shows great complexity for sparkles in this price bracket with an attractive biscotti bouquet. Drink it as a starter with a bowl of cashews. 'A TOP choice here for bargain hunters looking for a simple and straightforward bottle of fizz this season. It's very nice drinking to boot, with lemon florals and creams, a fine and lively mousse, a soft and appealing no-frills line and nice fresh finish.' - Adelaide Advertiser, 31 Oct 2012, by Tony Love.
name: Chardonnay Pinot Noir Nv 750ml

long_description:
This champagne is a brightly sparkling, light golden yellow liquid with an abundance of fine and elegant bubbles. The nose reveals initial aromas of ripe fresh fruit (white and yellow peaches, apricots), tropical notes (lychee and pineapple). It then opens up with the fragrance of vanilla before developing notes of milky caramel, breadcrumbs and yeast, culminating in aromas of dried fruit and honey. An explosion of freshness in the mouth, followed by strong persistence. The complex aromas of fresh fruit and caramel perpetuate the intensity. Mumm Grand Cordon signifies triumph and elation - a symbol of success to be experienced and celebrated, whether as a toast for the ultimate moment or savoured with a meal of white meat or fish such as monkfish or red mullet.
  • G.H. Mumm ensures that each bottle showcases the very best of the region, employing time-honoured traditional methods, the winemakers craft wines that exude the distinct Maison Mumm style-a perfect harmony of character and finesse
name: Cordon Rouge Nv Champagne 750ml

ingredients: bentonite, calcium tartrate, carbon, Plant protein, yeast, enzyme

AROMAS
Fresh and fruity with hints of lychee, paw paw, passionfruit and musk.

TASTE

finish. Flavours of apple juice, musk and orange blossom.

ENJOY

appetizers and even brunch.

long_description:
Great Northern Brewing Co. lager was brewed with an outdoor lifestyle in mind. Brewed in Queensland using a light stable hop to avoid the impact of sunlight, pale malt and lager yeast to produce a fruity, clean, refreshing lager.

With its fruity aroma, low bitterness and clean, crisp finish, it's the ultimate refreshment for the Great Northern conditions.

Our easy-drinking modern Australian Lager features stone fruit and citrus aromas, with a dash of late hopping adding subtle tropical notes. A slow fermentation using traditional lager yeast creates delicate floral notes on the palate. Finally an authentic Australian Lager that pairs well with a barbie on a sunny day.
  • Easy Drinking

  • Australian

  • Floral and Fruity

  • Refreshing

  • No preservatives

This crisp brew is that little drop of summer, light on hops and big on refreshment. Something you'll grab from the fridge with a smile and lip-smacking anticipation. Balter Cerveza  Spanish for Great Australian-Made Mexican Lager Beer. Just add sunshine!

Your well-contained taste explosion.

What we lacked in imagination when it came to the name, we really made up for in taste.

long_description:
A traditional apple cider taste. Fresh and delicious with a hint of acidity for crisp, clean refreshment. Clean apple character, medium weight palate, slight sweet taste, crisp clean finish - the classic apple cider taste. Fresh and delicious with a hint of acidity for crisp, clean refreshment. Best paired with Pulled pork burgers or Battered fish and crunchy chips.
Fruity: 2/5
Crispy/tangy: 3/5
Juicy/sweet: 3/5
name: Original Cider Can 375ml

long_description:
Created from a secret 1761 recipe, Bombay Sapphire Gin is a versatile spirit carefully crafted for a complex, layered taste.
Bombay Sapphire is made from 10 unique hand-selected botanicals from all corners of the earth including cubeb berries from Java, cassia bark from Indo-China, coriander from Morocco, and grains of paradise from West Africa. It is this combination of exotic botanicals combined with a unique vapour infusion process that creates the balanced profile of
Bombay Sapphire Gin.
name: Gin 1l

description: JOHNNIE WALKER DOUBLE BLACK SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Unleash the depth of smoke with Johnnie Walker Double Black. This Blended Scotch Whisky is intense and smoky, a masterpiece crafted from blending whiskies aged in deep charred oak casks and specially selected naturally smoky whiskies from the West Coast of Scotland. The result is a bold, full-bodied whisky with a flavour unlike any other. Double Black is perfect for those who love peated Scotch, as it offers a distinctive smokiness that is balanced with rich depth. This intense and award-winning Blended Scotch Whisky has earned recognition for its excellence, making it a great gift for whisky enthusiasts or anyone who wants to explore smoky whisky flavours. Enjoy Johnnie Walker Double Black neat, on the rocks, or mixed into your favourite whisky cocktail.
  • Johnnie Walker Double Black is inspired by Johnnie Walker Black Label, taking flavour to a bolder level with intense smoky notes, perfect for those who appreciate a richer Scotch experience.

  • Double Gold Winner at the San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2023.

  • Expertly crafted by the Johnnie Walker team of expert whisky makers led by Master Blender Emma Walker, it combines whiskies aged in deep charred oak casks and specially selected naturally smoky whiskies from the West Coast of Scotland.

  • Enjoy neat or on the rocks to fully appreciate the depth of its smoky character. It also makes a fantastic base for crafting unique and bold whisky cocktails.

  • Spiced cloves ignite dried fruit, with hints of orange peel and vanilla cutting through the lingering peat smoke for a complex and satisfying finish.

  • Gift a bold and smoky taste experience and surprise a whisky lover with a Johnnie Walker Double Black Blended Scotch Whisky..
name: Double Black Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
Sunny, lively and social, Aperol Spritz is the perfect drink to bring a touch of Italian style to any occasion. Aperol Spritz is best enjoyed during Aperitivo, Italy's iconic take on happy hour. Enjoy your own Aperitivo moment by sharing an Aperol Spritz with friends, while enjoying a delicious antipasto platter filled with cheese, olives, cured meats and artisan breads. Aperol's perfect blend of 16 ingredients, including bitter orange, rhubarb and an array of botanicals gives Aperol Spritz a unique orange colour and bittersweet taste.

Enjoy your Aperol Spritz Ready To Serve in a large wine glass, poured over ice with an orange wedge.
name: Spritz Bottle 200ml

long_description: New White Claw Variety Pack - made to share all Summer long. Whether you're into fresh Watermelon, ripe Mango, crisp Natural Lime or zesty Ruby Grapefruit, this pack has something for all your moments of refreshment.
name: Variety Can 330ml

long_description:
BACARDI Carta Blanca White Rum's delicate floral and fruity notes are best enjoyed mixed with soda, fresh juice or as a refreshing rum and cola cocktail. First created by Don Facundo BACARDI Masso in 1862, BACARDI Carta Blanca has since been recognised as the world's most-awarded rum.
  • Bacard Carta Blanca White Rum is the world's most awarded rum

  • Expertly crafted by the Maestros de Ron Bacard - first created by Don Facundo Bacard Masso in 1862

  • Bacard Carta Blanca was used in the first Daiquiri (1898) borne of the need for a cooling drink in the heat of Cuba

  • Bacard Carta Blanca was used in the first Mojito cocktail, recorded in Pedro Chicote's book La Ley Mojada from 1930

  • Bacard Carta Blanca White Rum is expertly blended using American white oak barrels and a secret blend of charcoals
name: Superior Rum 700ml

long_description:
The original. The icon. It's Captain Morgan Original Spiced Gold, a spiced rum-based spirit drink flavoured with the taste of vanilla, other natural flavours and spice for a irresistibly sweet yet subtly spiced taste. Versatility is its speciality. Make it hot, make it cold, make it sweet, make it fruity or even make it creamy. Delicious possibilities are there for the making.
  • Flavoured with the taste of vanilla, other natural flavours and spice.

  • Original Spiced Gold is made to mix. Lemonade, ginger ale, fresh orange, grapefruit, pineapple juice, coke you name it, it'll mingle with it.

  • Why not try a Captain Morgan & Lemonade - that oh-so-amazing cocktail duo.

  • Mix what tastes good. Fill up the ice tray. Then, make it up as you go along.

  • Captain Morgan drinks mix even better with food. If there's a better spirit drink for getting your friends around & ordering a pizza, we've yet to find it.

  • Whether you're a fan of classic spiced rum-based spirits cocktails like the Captain and Cola and Cuba Libre, or you're looking to create something new, there's a delicious world of possibilities out there - just waiting to be enjoyed..
name: Spiced Rum 1l

long_description: The first Dimple Whisky was crafted by the Haigs family in 1890 and every bottle is aged for a minimum of 12 years to enrich the blend. As with any blended Scotch the key to a good one is the balance of flavours which is delivered in droves by Dimple. Deep honey in colour, hints of honey and fruits with an oaky dry finish also come through showing the whisky's complexity. Have it with sticky pork ribs or dark chocolate to compliment a dessert. Best enjoyed on itself or over ice, it's perfect for a late nightcap.
name: 12yo Blended Scotch Whisky 700ml

description: THE GLENLIVET 12YO SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Representing The Glenlivet's signature style, The Glenlivet 12 Year Old single malt scotch whisky is first matured in traditional oak, before spending time in American oak casks that impart notes of vanilla and gives the whisky its distinctive smoothness. The mineral-rich water that comes from Josie's Well helps form the flavours during mashing and fermentation, whilst the specific height and width of the copper stills add a delicate yet complex character. Keep a bottle on hand for every occasion.
  • Award winning single malt

  • Aged for a minimum of 12 years
name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
BOMBAY SAPPHIRE gin is a uniquely balanced premium gin, the result of ten carefully hand-selected botanical ingredients from exotic locations around the world, vapour infused to capture the bright, vibrant flavours. This gin is perfect for a classic Martini or your next G&T!
  • Bombay Sapphire Gin is a highly versatile, perfect balance of 10 hand-selected botanicals from all over the world

  • We vapour infuse our carefully selected botanicals, which produces a lighter and more balanced flavour

  • Laverstoke, the home of Bombay Sapphire, is ecologically efficient by design and has won the prestigious BREEAM award

  • Bombay Sapphire Gin uses a gentle vapour infusion process to express the natural character of each ingredient

  • Bombay Sapphire botanicals are only added during distillation, never after. It is a true London Dry Gin
name: Gin 700ml

long_description:
Here's our story: coffee first met sugarcane spirit in 1936. It was love at first sight and we've been mixing things up ever since. Now it's your turn, with one of our delicious.
  • Made with Arabica coffee beans, offering a rich, coffee-forward flavour

  • Produced in Veracruz, Mexico, using local ingredients like coffee and rum

  • Combines coffee, rum, vanilla, and caramel, creating a smooth, balanced taste

  • Perfect for sipping, cocktails, or adding a twist to desserts

  • Recognizable for its rich, sweet, and velvety texture with a subtle kick of coffee
name: Coffee Liqueur 700ml

long_description: Cointreau, a masterpiece crafted through the unique distillation of all-natural sweet and bitter orange peels, resulting in a crystal clear liqueur that strikes the perfect balance between sweetness and freshness. The finest orange peels are carefully selected by Master Distiller, Bernadette Langlais, to create the definitive orange liqueur. Thanks to its perfect balance, Cointreau has been in the original recipes of the most internationally renowned cocktails (Margarita, Cosmopolitan, Sidecar, White Lady among others) since they have been created.
name: Liqueur 700ml

description: THE MACALLAN 12YO DOUBLE CASK SINGLE MALT WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
The Macallan Double Cask Collection celebrates the perfect union of our exceptional sherry seasoned American and European oak casks, crafted and seasoned in our cooperages and bodegas in Jerez de la Frontera. This balance delivers a smooth and creamy single malt of exception.

The story of two woods. Each, along with the vital influence of sherry used to season the casks, imparts distinctive flavour and natural colour, delivering a smooth and creamy single malt of exception and a multi-layered sensorial experience. 

The Macallan reimagined is seen through the lens of artistic translator, David Carson, and celebrates the journey of our sherry seasoned oak casks.
name: 12yo Double Cask Single Malt Whisky 700ml

description: JOHNNIE WALKER BLACK LABEL 12YO SCOTCH WHISKY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Indulge in the unmistakably big tasting and vibrant Johnnie Walker Black Label Blended Scotch Whisky, full of flavour with the volume turned up. Each sip bursts with layers of smooth and delicious big flavours all proudly on show creamy toffee, rich, sweet fruit and vanilla, all perfectly wrapped in a warming smoky finish. Expertly crafted by some of the world's most experienced whisky makers, this blend brings together 29+ whiskies matured for at least 12 years to create the symphony of smooth and delicious flavours of Johnnie Walker Black Label. Johnnie Walker Black Label is an incredibly smooth balance of big flavours, where no matter how loud one note is, it never drowns another one out, making it a premium choice for any occasion.
  • Some of the world's most experienced whisky makers expertly blend over 29 whiskies to create the big flavours of Johnnie Walker Black Label.

  • Indulge in the unmistakable taste of Johnnie Walker Black Label, a vibrant Blended Scotch Whisky that has won multiple awards, like Gold at the International Wine and Spirits Competition and the San Francisco World Spirit Competition in 2022.

  • Only the finest Scotch Whiskies, aged for at least 12 years, are carefully blended to achieve the perfect intensity and depth of flavour.

  • With a perfectly balanced and distinctive flavour profile, Johnnie Walker Black Label is an excellent choice whether you prefer sipping it neat, mixing it in classic cocktails such as Whisky Sour, or creating refreshing-tasting highballs.

  • Layers of smooth and delicious big flavour await in every sip of Johnnie Walker Black Label, featuring creamy toffee, rich sweet fruits, and a touch of vanilla, all wrapped in a warming smoky finish.

  • This award-winning Scotch Whisky is an impressive gift that captures the essence of smooth and smoky whiskies. The perfect gift for any tasting occasion..
name: Black Label 12yo Scotch Whisky 700ml

ingredients: Ugni Blanc
long_description:
Originally created in 1817 for King George IV, Hennessy V.S.O.P is a harmonious blend of carefully selected eaux-de-vie, patiently aged in French oak barrels. This maturation brings balance and depth, revealing notes of vanilla, toasted oak and gentle spice. Smooth and versatile, it's crafted to be enjoyed neat, over ice, or in refined cocktails.

  • Honouring a special demand from the Prince Regent of England in 1818, Hennessy V.S.O.P encapsulates the art of balancing power and finesse. The Hennessy Tasting Committee has achieved a natural balance of strengh and smoothness, making it the prefered V.S.O.P in the world.

  • Hennessy V.S.O.P is a balanced cognac, expressing 200 years of Hennessy's know-how
name: Vsop Cognac 700ml

long_description:
Inspired by recipes from the 1880's, award-winning Gordon's Premium Pink is crafted to balance the refreshing taste of Gordon's with the sweetness of raspberries and the tang of redcurrant. Made using only the highest quality ingredients and only natural flavourings to provide delicious tasting berry flavour. To enjoy a perfectly mixed Gordon's Premium Pink and Tonic, fill a large copa glass with ice, add 50 ml Gordon's Premium Pink, top with 150 ml tonic and garnish with plenty of juicy strawberries.
  • Award-winning Gordon's Premium Pink Distilled Gin provides a light and refreshing tasting drink that makes the ideal gift for gin lovers or simply to enjoy with friends.

  • Gordon's Premium Pink Distilled Gin balances the crisp, juniper taste of Gordon's with the sweetness of raspberries and a tang of redcurrant.

  • Inspired by recipes from the 1880's, Gordon's Premium Pink Distilled Gin is carefully crafted using the highest quality ingredients.

  • To enjoy a perfectly mixed Gordon's Premium Pink and Tonic, fill a large copa glass with ice, add 50 ml Gordon's Premium Pink, top with 150 ml tonic and garnish with plenty of juicy strawberries.

  • A light and refreshing tasting drink that is perfect for BBQs, get-togethers and parties, or simple catching up with friends.
name: Pink Gin 700ml

long_description:
Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey is one of the world's best-selling whiskeys with a smooth character and flavor, true to Mr. Jack Daniel's original recipe. This American whiskey is made from the finest corn, rye and barley malt mixed with the iron-free water that flows from the Cave Spring right on grounds of the distillery. From there, Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is charcoal mellowed, drop by drop, through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal, which imparts the distinct smoothness of this best-in-class whiskey. Finally, Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is matured in handcrafted, charred white oak barrels until the tasters decide it's ready. Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 is perfect with great music and in great company. Enjoy this alcohol drink neat, on the rocks, or in your favorite cocktails and mixed drinks, like an Old Fashioned or Whiskey Sour cocktail. Please Drink Responsibly.
  • Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey has smooth character with a balance of sweet and oaky flavors, true to the original recipe

  • Whiskey that is made from the finest corn, rye and barley malt mixed with iron-free water

  • Mellowed drop by drop through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal then matured in handcrafted, white oak whiskey barrels

  • 80 proof whiskey matured in handcrafted, white oak whiskey barrels

  • Enjoy this liquor neat, on the rocks, or in your favorite alcohol drinks such as Jack & Cola or an Old Fashioned

  • Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey is 40% alcohol by volume.

  • Have it Jack's way. Enjoy your whiskey on the rocks, with great music, in great company..

  • Charcoal-mellowed through 10 feet of sugar maple, aged in hand-crafted toasted and charred new American white oak barrels..
name: Whiskey 700ml

long_description:
Baileys is the World's Number 1 Irish Cream Liqueur around the globe*. With its distinct velvety texture, it is a perfect combination of smooth cream and Irish whiskey. Enjoy on its own, over ice or in your favourite coffee. And if you are looking for more ways to indulge, from gooey Baileys Irish Cream Cheesecake to classy Baileys Espresso Martini, Baileys recipes hit the sweet spot every time. Drawing on Irish traditions in dairy and distilling, the unique combination took four years to perfect the ultimate liquid treat. *IWSR 2022 Cream & Coffee Liqueur Category, Value & Volume Sales
  • Drawing on Irish traditions in dairy and distilling, Baileys took 4 years to perfect, crafting a distinctive, velvety texture for the perfect combination of smooth cream and Irish whiskey

  • The sweetest meeting of fine Irish whiskey, Irish dairy cream, rich chocolate and vanilla flavours

  • Great on its own, served over ice cream for a sophisticated twist, or even in your favourite treats such as Chocolate Mousse, Hot Chocolate or Iced Coffee!

  • Baileys is the most loved and number one selling Irish cream liqueur around the globe* and Baileys Original has been awarded a gold medal at the Meininger's International Spirit Award in 2027

  • Want to treat someone else? Why not delight your loved ones with an indulgent Birthday Gift or Friday night treat

  • Baileys is B Corp Certified - The B Corp movement is focused on transforming the global economy to benefit all people, communities, and the planet, building a more resilient and sustainable future for all.
name: Irish Cream Liqueur 700ml

Jim Beam White & Zero Sugar Cola. Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey.

long_description:
No one has made tequila longer. Or better. In 1795, Jose María Guadalupe de Cuervo began selling the very first Vino Mezcalde Tequila de Jose Cuervo after receiving the first official charter from the King of Spain to produce tequila commercially. Cuervo has been producing tequila at La Rojena, the oldest active distillery in Latin America, ever since.
Legend has it that Especial Reposado was used to make the first ever Margarita, the world's best selling cocktail. Jose Cuervo Especial Reposado is a blend of Reposado and younger tequilas. The result is a well-balanced, smooth tequila.

  • Made in Jalisco, Mexico

  • Worlds #1 Tequila Brand
name: Reposado Tequila 700ml

long_description:
GREY GOOSE vodka is the result of an absolute determination to create a French vodka unlike any other. This extraordinary vodka is made from the best ingredients from France, soft winter wheat and Gensac spring water. GREY GOOSE is best enjoyed straight, with a mixer, in a Spritz or in a classic vodka Martini or Espresso Martini cocktail.
  • Grey Goose premium flavoured vodka is created using only the finest French ingredients.

  • Grey Goose Vodka's two single-origin ingredients are winter wheat from Picardie and spring water from Gensac-la-Pallue.

  • The soft winter wheat used in Grey Goose Vodka is the same high quality wheat used in famous French breads and pastries.

  • The water used in Grey Goose is naturally filtered through underground limestone so deep it's untouched by pollutants.

  • The two ingredients of Grey Goose Vodka are traceable from field to bottle.
name: Vodka 700ml

long_description:
1888: Launch of a liquid legend.

Through the hard graft of just 5 Queenslanders, rum becomes reality. Bundaberg's signature sugar graduates from cupcakes into the world of finely crafted spirits. Little did these bold visionaries know, their rum would quickly become the most famous in the land.
name: UP Rum 1l

long_description:
The Mayfair brand is synonymous with gins of exceptional quality. Our products are handcrafted using a traditional recipe, resulting in distinctive and captivating flavours. Discover a classic dry style with clean crisp citrus notes and earthy undertones with a smooth juniper led finish. Botanicals include Angelica, Almond, Coriander, Cassia, Juniper, Lemon & Orris that give the gin both complexity and balance. Bursting with flavour but also light and refreshing, it is an ideal accompaniment to any dish with smoked salmon.

Awards:
  • Silver San Francisco International Spirits Competition 2023.
  • Silver The Spirit Business Global Gin Masters 2023.
name: London Dry Gin 1l

long_description:
Smirnoff No.21 Premium Vodka is the number one best-selling premium vodka in the world, with countless years of heritage and unmatched quality sold in over 130 countries. It is triple distilled from grain and filtered ten times through charcoal for an exceptionally pure-tasting, smooth spirit. Smirnoff No. 21 Premium Vodka can be used in a wide range of drinks and cocktails: make a perfect pre-dinner drink such as Smirnoff Espresso Martini: 50 ml Smirnoff, 25 ml espresso, 25 ml coffee liquor, sugar syrup and cubed ice. Shake all up in a shaker with ice and serve. Or if prefer something refreshing tasting for the Summer: Blend 25 ml citrus fruit juice of your choice, soda water, iced cubes and garnish with citrus fruit wedges. Just enjoy! Smirnoff is ideal to make delicious drinks at home. There is vodka, then there's Smirnoff.
  • Smirnoff No.21 Premium Vodka is the number one best-selling premium vodka in the world.

  • Gold medal winner at the 2019 San Francisco World Spirits Competition, and a double gold medal winner at the 2019 Las Vegas Global Spirit Awards.

  • Triple distilled from grain, filtered ten times through charcoal.

  • Exceptionally smooth with a clean palate.

  • The preferred vodka for a wide range of cocktails such as the Smirnoff Passionfruit or Espresso Martini cocktail or a Smirnoff Soda Fruit Smash.

  • Enjoy an afternoon with the Smirnoff Soda Fruit Smash. Pour 25ml Smirnoff into a highball glass filled with ice, fill with 150ml soda and squeeze half a citrus fruit into the glass. Why not experiment with orange, grapefruit or lime?.
name: Red Vodka 700ml

It uses Suntory's unique Freeze Crush Technology to capture every bit of all-natural bold lemon flavour. Lemons are frozen at -196°C, crushed and then infused in spirits, then blended with Shochu, Vodka & Soda. WHOLE, FREEZE, CRUSH EXTREME JAPANESE SPIRIT!

With 0.3 grams of sugar and only 122 calories per serve, Suntory -196 Double Lemon is the drink of choice for your next social occasion.

  • Real, whole lemons

  • 0.3 grams of sugar per serve

  • 122 calories per serve

  • From Suntory's No.1 Premix in Japan*

Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey and Cola delivers a ready to drink whiskey cocktail that features one of the world's best selling whiskies with a twist. Perfectly pre-mixed, this canned drink combines Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 with fizzy cola for a refreshingly all-time classic mixed drink. You can enjoy the convenient format of these Jack and Cola whiskey cocktails on the go, straight from the fridge, or right out of the cooler. Simply serve it cold straight from the can or over ice, and always in good company. Add these Jack and Cola canned cocktails to your cooler alongside beer and hard seltzer. If you want a whiskey cocktail ready to go, Jack Daniel's has you covered. Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey and Cola is real Jack that's ready to go whenever you are. Live Freely. Drink Responsibly.
  • This whiskey cocktail offers the perfect mix of Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey and cola

  • A refreshing, ready to drink canned alcohol cocktail

  • These mixed drinks are best served cold straight from the can or over ice, and always in good company

description: JACK DANIELS GENTLEMAN JACK TENNESSEE WHISKEY 700ML:EA
long_description:
Inspired by the original gentleman distiller and founder, Jack Daniel's Gentleman Jack Tennessee Whiskey; 80 proof (40% ALC/VOL) is double-mellowed to achieve exceptional smoothness. Crafted by combining traditional methods with a unique process of its own, each batch of Jack Daniel's Tennessee whiskey begins with a well-considered recipe of corn, barley, rye, malt, and iron-free limestone spring water that lives within the depths of a two-mile deep cave. This single-distilled, double-mellowed alcohol is placed into handmade, charred white oak whiskey barrels for maturation. The resulting whiskey delivers a balanced oak flavor with notes of caramel and vanilla. Ideal for tasting, sipping and mixing, Gentleman Jack Tennessee Whiskey is perfect for celebrating life's extraordinary occasions, plus all the moments along the way. Try Gentleman Jack in mixed drinks, like Gentleman's Sour, or simply enjoy it neat in your favorite glass. An approachable whiskey that's perfect for a variety of tastes, Gentleman Jack has a clean, soft nose and is flavour forward in the mouth with a warm, short finish. Please Drink Responsibly.
  • Double charcoal mellowed liquor offers exceptional smoothness

  • Gentleman Jack Tennessee Whiskey has a clean, soft nose, a balanced oak flavor, notes of caramel and vanilla, and a warm, short finish

  • Single-distilled, twice charcoal-mellowed whiskey that matures to perfection in white oak barrels before being placed into whiskey bottles

  • Great whiskey for sipping neat, on the rocks or mixed into your favorite cocktail or alcohol drinks

  • Perfect alcohol drink for celebrating life's extraordinary occasions, and all the moments along the way
name: Gentleman Jack Tennessee Whiskey 700ml
