long_description:
Unveiling a legacy of excellence, Tanqueray London Dry Gin boasts a timeless recipe crafted since 1830. This award-winning spirit, a true premium London Dry Gin, undergoes a meticulous four-time distillation process for unparalleled smoothness. The secret to Tanqueray's captivating flavour lies in its unique blend of four botanicals. Refreshing tasting juniper berries provide the foundation, perfectly balanced by the peppery warmth of coriander and the aromatic sweetness of angelica root. A subtle hint of sweet liquorice adds a touch of complexity, creating a versatile gin perfect for crafting exceptional cocktails. While Tanqueray shines in a classic Gin & Tonic with tonic water, ice, and a lime wedge, its potential extends far beyond. This best-selling gin, was awarded 'Highly Commended' in The Gin Guide Awards, and is perfect whether in a gin and tonic, or in your favourite gin cocktail. Explore endless recipe possibilities and discover your new favourite drink using Tanqueray London Dry Gin. Beautifully presented in its iconic bottle, Tanqueray London Dry Gin makes a fantastic gift for any gin enthusiast or cocktail connoisseur. Experience Tanqueray London Dry Gin, and uncap a legacy of quality and flavour.
  • Tanqueray London Dry Gin is a premium gin distilled four times for unmatched smoothness and clarity.

  • Crafted using a timeless recipe: Tanqueray London Dry Gin is a premium gin distilled four times for unmatched smoothness and clarity.

  • Experience the perfect harmony of four botanicals: juniper for freshness, coriander for spice, angelica root, and liquorice for a sweet finish.

  • Ideal for gin cocktails: Elevate a Gin & Tonic with Tanqueray's balanced blend, perfect for crafting your favourite cocktail recipes.

  • Award-winning flavour: Savour the distinctive taste that makes Tanqueray the best choice for gin enthusiasts.

  • The ultimate gin gift: Tanqueray's iconic bottle, inspired by 1920s cocktail shakers, is the perfect present for special occasions..

  • Mix the classic Tanqueray Gin with premium tonic water, ice, and a squeeze of citrus for a zesty drink that shines with quality..

long_description:
Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey is one of the world's best-selling whiskeys with a smooth character and flavor, true to Mr. Jack Daniel's original recipe. This American whiskey is made from the finest corn, rye and barley malt mixed with the iron-free water that flows from the Cave Spring right on grounds of the distillery. From there, Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is charcoal mellowed, drop by drop, through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal, which imparts the distinct smoothness of this best-in-class whiskey. Finally, Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey is matured in handcrafted, charred white oak barrels until the tasters decide it's ready. Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 is perfect with great music and in great company. Enjoy this alcohol drink neat, on the rocks, or in your favorite cocktails and mixed drinks, like an Old Fashioned or Whiskey Sour cocktail. Please Drink Responsibly.
  • Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey has smooth character with a balance of sweet and oaky flavors, true to the original recipe

  • Whiskey that is made from the finest corn, rye and barley malt mixed with iron-free water

  • Mellowed drop by drop through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal then matured in handcrafted, white oak whiskey barrels

  • 80 proof whiskey matured in handcrafted, white oak whiskey barrels

  • Enjoy this liquor neat, on the rocks, or in your favorite alcohol drinks such as Jack & Cola or an Old Fashioned

description: MAKERS MARK KENTUCKY STRAIGHT BOURBON WHISKY 1L:EA
long_description:
Any time your're in the neighborhood, stop by and visit us at our distillery, near Loretto, Kentucky. This beautifully restored home of Maker's Mark is a designated Kentucky and National Historic Landmark.

Fully Matured alcohol 40% by volume (Eighty Proof).

Marker's Mark is America's only handmade bourbon whisky - never mass produced. 

Each individual batch is less than 19 barrels, and this small quantity means we can be choosy about everything we use and everything we do to craft our whisky. 

That's why we use the old-style sour-mash method. We start each new batch fermentation by using a little of the last resulting in a more consistent product. 

We're proud of our unique and full-flavoured handmade bourbon, and so we add our Marker's Mark to each bottle. Enjoy!
name: Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whisky 1l

long_description:
Experience the richness of Speyside, Scotland with the multi-award-winning Singleton of Dufftown 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky. A true labour of love, this whisky is an embodiment of our passion for crafting perfectly balanced, smooth, yet rich whisky. The whisky matures in a careful blend of American Bourbon and European Sherry casks, creating a harmonious balance that defines its unique character. This meticulous process results in an enticing aroma of toasted nuts, intertwined with rich fruit notes. On the palate, expect an accessible symphony of blackcurrant, brown sugar, and coffee - a flavour profile that has won Gold at the International Spirits Challenge and the San Francisco World Spirits Competition in 2022. The Singleton of Dufftown 12 Year Old is delicious neat or with ice, but its smooth, versatile flavour profile also pairs well with mixers like soda or apple juice for a refreshing-tasting whisky cocktail. It's the perfect gift this Christmas season or any special occasion, guaranteed to please both new and experienced Single Malt Whisky drinkers. So whether you're new to the world of Scotch Whisky or a seasoned connoisseur, indulge in the smooth, fruity, and balanced taste of The Singleton of Dufftown 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky.
  • Crowned with a Gold award at the prestigious San Francisco World Spirits Competition and International Spirits Challenge in 2022, a testament to its exceptional quality.

  • The Singleton of Dufftown 12 Year Old Scotch Whisky is meticulously aged in Pedro Ximenez Oloroso seasoned casks and refill ex-bourbon casks, hand-selected for their distinctive honey notes and nutty intensity.

  • A perfectly balanced Speyside Single Malt Whisky that envelops your palate with soft cooked apples, luscious brown sugar, creamy espresso coffee, and roasted nutty notes.

  • The Singleton of Dufftown is distilled in the historic Dufftown distillery of Speyside, a beacon of fine Single Malt production since 1896. Every step in our production process is designed to create the best-tasting Single Malt Whisky.

  • Exceptionally smooth and enjoyable neat or on the rocks, and equally delightful when mixed with soda or apple juice for a refreshing whisky cocktail.

  • Best enjoyed standing, singing, laughing and in good company..

  • With its smooth, balanced flavour, The Singleton of Dufftown 12 Year Old is an ideal Christmas gift for both novice Single Malt Whisky drinkers and lovers of refined Speyside whiskies..
name: 12yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
Award-winning Gordon's London Dry Gin is the No.1 international best-selling gin. The Gordon's distillery was established in 1769 by Alexander Gordon as he set out on a mission to produce a gloriously tasting gin worthy of carrying his family name. Gordon believed that success lay in the elegant combination of pure distilled grain spirit and rich botanicals. To this day Gordon's is distilled to this same exacting standard and the product is triple distilled to guarantee the purity of the gin. The exact blend of botanicals remains a closely guarded secret with a combination of hand picked wild juniper berries, coriander, angelica and liquorice. The attention to detail results in a distinctive flavour that mixes elegantly in long drinks and cocktails. To savour the ideal taste for yourself, mix a Gordon's and tonic and garnish with lime. It's the long mixed drink, ideal any time, but especially good when enjoyed with friends.
  • Award-winning Gordon's is distilled to the same exacting standards to this day. Its carefully crafted recipe has earned its reputation as the ginniest of gins.

  • Hand picked wild juniper berries, coriander, angelica and liquorice are blended in a secret process that only size people in the world know, producing a distinctive juniper taste that makes for a classic G and T.

  • Mix 50 ml Gordon's London Dry Gin with 150 ml tonic over ice and garnish with a juicy lime wedge for a delicious and refreshing tasting G and T.

  • The juniper character in Gordon's enhances the other carefully selected botanicals and provides a crisp refreshing tasting G and T when served with tonic and a lime wedge.

  • Alexander Gordon started his distillery in London in 1769 and set about creating the recipe for a brilliant-tasting gin. To this day Gordon's is distilled to this same exacting standard and is the world's number 1 international gin. Gordon's high quality and distinctive juniper flavour has come to define the taste of the classic G and T.
name: Gin 700ml

long_description: An exceptionally smooth 10-Year-Old Highland Single Malt Whisky with layers of candied ginger, sweet peach and a burst of citrus which mellows to reveal a creamy Highland toffee finish. Sweet and delightfully syrupy with gratifying flavours of fresh orange blossom, honey and sugared almonds. Enjoys a decent length with a very appealing honeyed finish. Proudly born and lovingly bred in the loch-speckled hills of the Highland whisky region of Scotland, at Levenside we seek to craft quintessentially Highland style whiskies. AWARDS: Silver at the Scotch Whisky Masters 2023. Silver at the International Spirits Challenge Whisky Awards 2023. Bronze at the Melbourne International Spirits Competition 2022 (92 Points).
name: 10yo Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700ml

long_description:
The Singleton of Dufftown Malt Master Selection is aged in barrels hand-selected by Craig Wilson, Master of Malt, and finished in three distinct barrel types: refill, sherry and bourbon. This whisky is smooth in texture with predominantly sweet notes featuring hints of honey and vanilla coupled with fresh pear on a faint base of wood ash.
  • Aged in barrels hand selected by the Master of Malt

  • Smooth in texture

  • Predominant sweet notes with hints of honey and vanilla
name: Malt Master's Selection Whisky 700ml

long_description:
True to an original lemon flavour, Hard Rated is made with crushed lemons to deliver a refreshing lemon taste with an alcoholic kick.
  • Made with crushed lemons
name: Can 375ml

long_description: The traditional blending skills of John Samson have been perfected over countless generations, resulting in the perfect marriage of malt and grain whiskies, each one carefully selected from the untold distilleries of Scotland. Only the finest of whiskies have been used to create this unique blend. An enjoyable blend, where the sweetness of the malt is balanced by the smooth grain offering a clean, fresh and slightly peated taste. Perfect poured over a generous amount of ice. AWARD: Gold Medal   2020 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.
name: Scotch Whisky 700ml
